strengths: Extensive full-stack experience utilizing the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across highly scalable platforms.
Direct, hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Exceptional background in testing and software craftsmanship, including building custom test runners and teaching TDD.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though highly experienced in Node.js and other testing frameworks.
Does not explicitly list Kotlin or Python experience, which are noted in the secondary and required skills.
Currently holds Staff Engineer and Founder titles, which suggests she may be overqualified for a Mid-Senior role.
response.justification: Aisha is an exceptionally strong candidate who significantly exceeds the 6-year experience requirement. She brings deep architectural expertise in the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, an outstanding background in software testing, and highly relevant, niche experience in AI agent infrastructure. While she lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin, her polyglot background (Java, DLang, C++) and history of building custom testing frameworks strongly mitigate this gap. Despite potentially being overqualified given her Staff-level experience, her technical alignment and customer-oriented delivery make her a phenomenal fit for the role.
